---
name: "Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement for TDOC"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Note:** We recommend using the [structured feature request form](https://github.com/djunekz/tdoc/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml) for a better experience.

## Describe the Feature

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case / Problem

Explain why this feature would be useful and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Solution

*(Optional)* Describe a possible implementation or approach.

## Alternatives Considered

*(Optional)* Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Environment

- **TDOC Version:** (run `tdoc version`)
- **Feature Category:** Scan / Fix / Report / Benchmark / i18n / Plugin / UX / Other

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature is relevant to Termux / Android users
